{{Object Infobox
|name=Football Helmet
|image=Football Helmet.png
|damage reduction=80%
|durability=315
}}
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
'''Football Helmet''' is a wearable [[Armor|armor]] item made from Pig Skin.

== {{Pic|32|Science Machine}} Crafting ==
It is crafted at a Science Machine and protects the wearer.

{| class="wikitable"
! Stat !! Value
|-
| Damage reduction || 80%
|-
| Durability || 315
|}

=== Tips ===
Players may prefer it when Pig Skin is readily available.

== Gallery ==
<gallery>
File:Football Helmet.png|Inventory icon
</gallery>

=== Alternate icons ===
This presentation-only subsection must be skipped with its Gallery parent.

[[Category:Armor]]
[[Category:Items]]
[[Category:Don't Starve Together]]
